notes: Stick-figure validation rig aligned to the reference badminton stance. Sprite parts should be cut from the AIART modular sheets and attached to these logical joints.

joints.hip: root for pelvis and leg rotation
joints.head: head/mask sprite center
joints.racket_head: racket head / hit frame visual point

animation_phases.idle: compact badminton ready stance with knees bent and racket near chest/head side
animation_phases.run: phase-driven front/back foot alternation; no vertical crawling
animation_phases.clear: small windup, high forward contact, controlled follow-through
animation_phases.drop: shorter windup and softer forward contact
animation_phases.smash: larger overhead windup, jump lift, high forward contact, downward follow-through
animation_phases.skill: smash timing with larger jump lift and stronger effects
